heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 410nnn–6 Authorization of appropriations
text: There is authorized to be appropriated $6,000,000 for acquisition of lands and interests in lands for purposes of the Palo Alto Battlefield National Historical Park.
notes: Amendments2009— substituted “National Historical Park” for “National Historic Site”.Pub. L. 111–11
amendments: Amendments2009— substituted “National Historical Park” for “National Historic Site”.Pub. L. 111–11
